name: RPL2_RPL40_RPL27_ohnolog_complex
description: Multi-paralog ribosomal-protein WGD ohnolog complex covering RPL2A/B, RPL40A/B, RPL27A/B and dozens more near-identical paralog pairs. Together account for ~118 of the ~550 WGD ohnolog pairs in S. cerevisiae.
expected_copy_count: 2 ohnologous copies (post-WGD pair) on different chromosomes
